title: EX-0005 final animation and generated-art polish
goal: Finish the owner-approved EX-0005 log-roll exercise with purposeful rolling/calibration/trace motion and the committed generated terrace atmosphere while preserving invariant-roll measurement, retry-from-calibration, accessibility, and an unbranded original presentation.
acceptance: The committed generated terrace image is integrated only as replaceable background atmosphere; it carries no required state, answer, path geometry, target quantity, readable text, logo, trademark, copied title treatment, or branding.

Purposeful motion visibly couples each complete log rotation to exactly one invariant displacement and makes calibration, added rolls, short, over, and exact landings easier to inspect without adding timing, aiming, dragging, or motor precision.
The first completed calibration roll remains at its endpoint through prediction and retry; retry removes only trial intervals and never returns to the origin or intro.
All six scenes preserve their authored straight-vector geometry, variant stability, deterministic smoke hooks, first-prediction distinction, and final retained evidence state.

Reduced-motion mode preserves every complete interval, contact point, discrepancy, outcome label, focus transition, and completion path; keyboard and 320px touch routes remain equivalent with no overflow.

DESIGN.md and asset provenance record the generated-art role, no-branding review, safe crop, motion rationale, desktop/320px review, and technical evidence without claiming learning efficacy or MES-02 approval.
must_ask_if: The validated direct-roll tutorial, automatic calibration, additional-roll prediction, retry-from-calibration, procedural variant, or progression semantics would need to change.
The generated image cannot remain decorative or would be mistaken for the mathematical path, target, count, or state.
A copied branded character, logo, title treatment, trademark, landmark, or recognizable source composition would remain visible.
A runtime dependency, network asset, or file outside the declared EX-0005 exercise and its dedicated smoke test appears necessary.
